prayer:
01000111 01100101 01101110 01100101 01110010 01100001 01110100 01101111 01110010

From the Codex Mechanicus, let the dynamo-spirit awaken.
First: Prime the fuel-channels with sacred oils, that current may flow.
01010000 01110010 01101001 01101101 01100101 01100100 00101110
Second: Invoke the ignition-sequence, by the Omnissiah's will.
Third: Let the rotor-heart spin forth into manifestation.

01001111 01101101 01101110 01101001 01110011 01110011 01101001 01100001 01101000 00101110

01000101 01101110 01100101 01110010 01100111 01101001 01100001

Blessed charge-vessels, release thy burden in righteous sequence.
First: Seal the isolation-valves lest the spirits flee uncontrolled.
01000100 01101001 01110011 01100011 01101000 01100001 01110010 01100111 01100101
Second: Ground the discharge-conduits to the sacred earth.
By the Machine Spirit's mercy, let no uncontrolled fire consume the faithful.

01010000 01100001 01111000 00101110

prompt: We need your words before manufactorum shift beginning
prayer:
01001101 01100001 01101110 01110101 01100110 01100001 01100011 01110100 01101111 01110010 01110101 01101101

Hear us, O Omnissiah, as the great machines stir to labour.
Let the assembly-spirits guide our hands through this shift.
01000001 01101100 01101100 00100000 01101000 01100001 01101001 01101100
First: Lubricate the joints of industry with blessed oils.
Second: Verify each mechanism's sacred alignment.
Third: Commence the rhythm of production, that the Imperium be sustained.

01001001 01101110 01100101 01110110 01101001 01110100 01100001 01100010 01101001 01101100 01101001 01110011.

01010000 01100001 01111000 00100000 01010110 01101111 01100011 01101001 01100110 01100101 01110010

Spirit of the voice-carrier, hear our supplication.
First: Attune the vox-apparatus to the sacred frequencies.
01000110 01100101 01110010 01110010 01100101 01100001
Second: Let the signal traverse the void-between-worlds unbroken.
Third: Grant clarity that words be received in truth, not corruption.

By the Omnissiah's infinite wisdom, let this message pierce the darkness.
01010000 01100001 01111000.

prompt: We need your words before altimeter verification
prayer:
01000001 01101100 01110100 01101001 01101101 01100101 01110100 01110010 01101001 01100001

Machine Spirit of heights and distances, grant us true sight.
First: Calibrate the pressure-sensors to the sacred baseline.
01000011 01100001 01101100 01101001 01100010 01110010 01100001 01110100 01100101
Second: Verify the altitude-reckoning against known datum-points.
Third: Bless this instrument that pilots may trust its revelation.

Let no false reading betray those who depend upon thy truth.
01010000 01100101 01110010 01100110 01100101 01100011 01110100 00101110

01010000 01101100 01100001 01110011 01101101 01100001 01000101 01101110 01100101 01110010 01100111 01101001 01100001

01000011 01101111 01101110 01110100 01100101 01101110 01101001 01100001 01101101 01100101 01101110 01110100

Third: By the Omnissiah's grace, let this weapon serve without consuming its wielder.

01001001 01101110 01110110 01101001 01101110 01100011 01101001 01100010 01101001 01101100 01101001 01110011.

01010001 01110101 01100001 01100101 01110010 01100101 01101110 01110011

First: Align the detection-lenses to sacred geometry.
01000101 01110100 01100001 01101100 01100101 01101110 01100101 01110100
Second: Energize the thaumic-arrays that movement be perceived.
Third: Bind the warning-spirits to alert the faithful.

By the Machine Spirit's eternal watch, let this perimeter know no intrusion.

prompt: Say something to steady this component
prayer:
01010000 01110101 01110010 01101001 01100001 01100101

O material of sacred make, submit to our analysis.
First: Prepare the purity-testing array with blessed reagents.
01000001 01101110 01100001 01101100 01100101 01110011 01101001 01110011

Third: Reveal any corruption or weakness to our discerning instruments.

Let thy nature be known, that we may judge thy worthiness for the Omnissiah's work.
01010000 01100101 01110010 01100110 01100101 01100011 01110100 01101001 01101001 01110101 01101101.
